hero.title: The Kumaon Fest Summer Carnival
hero.description: Join us on 30th May for an unforgettable night of music, art, and culture at Kripa Sindhu Banquet, Haldwani. Featuring Kartikey Uniyal and many more!

about.title: About the Carnival
about.description: The Kumaon Fest is back with its Summer Carnival edition! Experience the vibrant spirit of Kumaon through live music, traditional arts, and a community like no other.
about.subDescription: This year we are bringing together 10+ artists for a 5-hour non-stop celebration of creativity and joy.

events.title: Carnival Highlights
events.subtitle: A diverse lineup of artists and experiences waiting for you.

highlights.title: Main Stage
highlights.description: Headlined by Kartikey Uniyal with power-packed performances by Rakesh Manral and Arti.

highlights.title: Cultural Zone
highlights.description: Explore the rich heritage of Kumaon through art installations and craft stalls.

highlights.title: Food Carnival
highlights.description: Savor local delicacies and popular summer treats at our curated food court.

highlights.title: Artist Meet
highlights.description: Exclusive opportunities for Premium and Fanpit pass holders to meet the stars.

schedule.title: Carnival Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Plan your evening at the Summer Carnival

events.description: Entry and Warm-up sets by local artists
Rakesh Manral, Arti, and Band performance

gallery.title: Summer Carnival Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Relive the best moments from our previous editions.

community.title: Setup Your Stall
community.description: Be a part of the biggest Food Carnival in Haldwani. Showcase your culinary skills or local treats to a 2000+ strong audience.

opportunities.title: Food Stalls
opportunities.description: Book a space for your bakery, cafe, or local food business.

opportunities.title: Pop-up Shops
opportunities.description: Sell your unique products and reach a massive local crowd.

tickets.title: Book Your Spot
tickets.subtitle: Don't miss the biggest night in Haldwani. Tickets are selling fast!
